languages.text: "Ничего странного не слышу. По-моему, тебе стоит еще и слух проверить".
"I don't hear anything strange. I think you should get your hearing checked, too."
languages.original_text: "Ничего странного не слышу. По-моему, тебе стоит еще и слух проверить".

traits.locale_text: "I don't hear anything strange. I think you should get your hearing checked, too."
"I don't hear anything strange. I think you should get your hearing checked, too."
"I don't hear anything strange. I think you should get your hearing checked, too."

languages.text: 「何か変なもの聞こえない。あなたも耳の検査を受けてみるといい」
languages.original_text: "I don't hear anything strange. I think you should get your hearing checked, too."

languages.text: "Ben garip bir şey duymuyorum. Bence sen de işitme duyunu kontrol ettirmelisin."
languages.original_text: "I don't hear anything strange. I think you should get your hearing checked, too."

traits.locale_text: "Ben garip bir şey duymuyorum. Bence sen de işitme duyunu kontrol ettirmelisin."

languages.text: “我没听见什么异响。或许你该顺便检查下听力。”
languages.original_text: "I don't hear anything strange. I think you should get your hearing checked, too."

traits.locale_text: “我没听见什么异响。或许你该顺便检查下听力。”

languages.text: "Ich höre nichts Seltsames. Vielleicht solltest du auch dein Gehör prüfen lassen."
languages.original_text: "I don't hear anything strange. I think you should get your hearing checked, too."

traits.locale_text: "Ich höre nichts Seltsames. Vielleicht solltest du auch dein Gehör prüfen lassen."

languages.text: « Je n'entends rien qui sorte de l'ordinaire. Vous devriez peut-être faire vérifier votre audition, aussi ? »
languages.original_text: "I don't hear anything strange. I think you should get your hearing checked, too."

traits.locale_text: « Je n'entends rien qui sorte de l'ordinaire. Vous devriez peut-être faire vérifier votre audition, aussi ? »

languages.text: «Yo no oigo nada. Tal vez convenga una revisión de la audición».
languages.original_text: "I don't hear anything strange. I think you should get your hearing checked, too."

traits.locale_text: «Yo no oigo nada. Tal vez convenga una revisión de la audición».
